name: skyrimnet-plugins-validator
description: Scripts run by SkyrimNet-Plugins CI workflows. Includes validate.mjs (structural validation, used by validate.yml) and agent-review.mjs (LLM content review, used by agent-review.yml). Both run against the base branch's files and receive the PR content as read-only data. Never installed or run from PR-supplied code. agent-review.mjs has no external dependencies (only Node built-ins + fetch); the listed dependencies are used by validate.mjs.
